title: ancistrorhynchus paysanii
intro: Ancistrorhynchus paysanii, also known as the Pansan orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The Pansan orchid is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Its extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the Pansan orchid is often combined with other medicinal plants to create teas, infusions, and ointments for topical application.
